name: @euroclaw/egress
description: euroclaw's outbound egress safety floor: the non-negotiable network guard beneath any policy — SSRF range rejection (loopback / private / link-local / CGNAT / unspecified, IPv4+IPv6), https-only, and resolve-once address pinning. Node-free — the caller injects the DNS resolver.
author: Konstantin Ponomarev
